_note: Svelte-4 comma-separated reactive-dependency idiom `$: a, b, c, expr`. Under --tsgo this fires TS2695 ("Left side of comma operator is unused") on each bare-identifier dep (upstream language-tools#2973); the default svelte-check filters those for reactive deps. We prevent it at emit: the reactive rewrite turns the sequence's top-level commas into semicolons (length-preserving), so each dep is a referenced statement and no TS2695 fires.
